source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Precise operations UI typography with compact numerals and Japanese guidance tuned for dashboards, runbooks, monitoring, and asset workflows.
layout: Disciplined 8px grids, low-radius operational surfaces, brushed-metal dividers, strong status hierarchy, and red-streak focus states.

prompts.label: Transparent hematite motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Hematite transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a hematite mineral motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A natural hematite specimen from an iron ridge, with polished metallic gunmetal grey surfaces, mirror-like hematite sheen, dark iron-black facets, subtle red-brown streaks, ochre iron oxide traces, dense mineral weight, and sharp but slightly worn crystalline plates. Geological accuracy, polished operations system identity, no jewelry and no fantasy crystal treatment.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include the full mineral mass without cropping. Clean studio lighting that reveals reflective gunmetal sheen; no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid green background for removal, one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: no jewelry setting, no hand, no landscape, no rainbow iridescence, no fantasy glow, no text, no watermark, no loose gemstones, no other minerals dominating.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Hematite light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Hematite", derived from a hematite mineral motif cutout. This board is a source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible polished operations UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional design-system presentation, no outer browser chrome.
Required visible sections: Morphous Hematite, Hematite, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language from polished hematite sheen, gunmetal grey reflective plates, iron-black facets, red-brown streaks, oxide ochre iron ridge traces, and dense mineral surface. The board must read as hematite mineral and iron ridge operations, not generic grey SaaS.
Typography: English operations UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI, Runbook Notes. Keep text short, large, and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: polished operations system, shadcn/tweakcn-style product UI, 8px radius, light iron-white backgrounds, charcoal gunmetal foreground, hematite red primary actions, steel grey muted panels, oxide ochre accents, precise grid, subtle brushed-metal and red-streak mineral texture, accessible contrast.
Palette names to show: Iron Ridge, Gunmetal Ink, Hematite Red, Steel Sheen, Polished Silver, Oxide Ochre, Ore Surface, Graphite Veil, Black Luster.
Constraints: no rainbow gradients, no purple-blue SaaS gradients, no neon, no unrelated saturated colors, no jewelry, no fantasy crystal glow, no tiny unreadable paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Hematite".

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Hematite dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Hematite". It must feel like the light-mode board translated to dark mode and remain derived from a polished hematite mineral motif.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional design-system presentation, no outer browser chrome.
Required visible sections: Morphous Hematite, Hematite, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve polished hematite sheen, gunmetal grey reflective plates, iron-black facets, red-brown streaks, oxide ochre iron ridge traces, and dense operational precision. Must read as hematite mineral and iron ridge operations, not generic dark SaaS.
Typography: English operations UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI, Runbook Notes. Keep text short, large, and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: near-black luster background, graphite cards, polished silver foreground text, hematite red primary buttons, steel-grey controls, oxide ochre warning/accent marks, red streak chart lines, brushed metal texture, 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid, accessible contrast.
Palette names to show: Iron Ridge, Gunmetal Ink, Hematite Red, Steel Sheen, Polished Silver, Oxide Ochre, Ore Surface, Graphite Veil, Black Luster.
Constraints: no rainbow gradients, no purple-blue SaaS gradients, no neon, no pure black flat-only background, no unrelated saturated colors, no jewelry, no fantasy crystal glow, no tiny unreadable paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Hematite".
